issuesFound.fix: Line: Add aria-label="Next testimonial" to the IconButton.

issuesFound.title: DesktopNav current link missing aria-current
issuesFound.explanation: The current page navigation link is indicated visually with a CSS class but lacks aria-current="page" to communicate the current location to assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add aria-current={item.current ? 'page' : undefined} to the anchor element.

issuesFound.title: MobileNav current link missing aria-current
issuesFound.explanation: The current page link in the mobile navigation is styled visually but lacks aria-current="page".
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add aria-current={item.current ? 'page' : undefined} to the anchor element.

issuesFound.title: PlanCard article missing aria-labelledby
issuesFound.explanation: The pricing card is an article element in a repeated grid but lacks aria-labelledby to reference its heading, making it difficult for screen reader users to identify specific cards.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add aria-labelledby={headingId} to the article element.

issuesFound.title: Button component missing aria-busy during loading
issuesFound.explanation: When isLoading is true, the button displays a spinner but does not communicate the busy state to assistive technology using aria-busy.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add aria-busy={isLoading ? 'true' : undefined} to the button element.

issuesFound.title: MobileNav close button missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The IconButton component requires an aria-label prop, but none is provided, resulting in an icon-only close button with no accessible name.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add aria-label="Close navigation menu" to the IconButton.

issuesFound.title: SiteHeader mobile menu toggle missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation toggle button controls the visibility of the mobile nav panel but lacks aria-expanded to communicate the menu state to assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add aria-expanded={isOpen} to the button element.

issuesFound.title: TextInput component missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The component accepts an invalid prop to style the field but does not programmatically indicate the invalid state to assistive technology using aria-invalid.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add aria-invalid={invalid ? 'true' : undefined} to the input element.

issuesFound.title: Textarea component missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The component accepts an invalid prop but does not set aria-invalid to communicate the error state to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add aria-invalid={invalid ? 'true' : undefined} to the textarea element.

issuesFound.title: Select component missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The component accepts an invalid prop but does not set aria-invalid to communicate the error state to assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add aria-invalid={invalid ? 'true' : undefined} to the select element.

issuesFound.title: NewsletterForm email input broken aria-describedby reference
issuesFound.explanation: The input references an error message ID 'newsletter-email-error' via aria-describedby when in error state, but FormGroup is not passed an errorId prop, so the element with that ID is never rendered in the DOM.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Pass errorId="newsletter-email-error" to FormGroup and ensure ErrorMessage is rendered with that id.

issuesFound.title: ContactForm message textarea broken aria-describedby reference
issuesFound.explanation: The textarea references 'contact-message-error' via aria-describedby when in error state, but FormGroup is not passed an errorId prop.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Pass errorId="contact-message-error" to the FormGroup wrapping the message field.

issuesFound.title: Modal aria-modal attribute on incorrect element

issuesFound.title: BillingToggle monthly button missing aria-pressed

issuesFound.title: Modal overlay div missing button semantics
issuesFound.explanation: The modal overlay div has an onClick handler to close the dialog but lacks role="button", tabIndex={0}, and keyboard support, preventing keyboard users from activating the backdrop to close.

issuesFound.title: SiteHeader mobile toggle missing aria-expanded
